xrefdescription.para: This function is a no-op. Call xmlCleanupParser to free global state but see the warnings there. xmlCleanupParser should be only called once at program exit. In most cases, you don't have call cleanup functions at all.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDictPtr dict, const xmlChar *name, unsigned int namelen)
memberdef.name: xmlDictAddString

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDictPtr dict, const xmlChar *prefix, unsigned int plen, const xmlChar *name, unsigned int namelen)
memberdef.name: xmlDictAddQString

simplesect.para: the newly created dictionary, or NULL if an error occurred.

briefdescription.para: Create a new dictionary, inheriting strings from the read-only dictionary sub.

detaileddescription.para: On lookup, strings are first searched in the new dictionary, then in sub, and if not found are created in the new dictionary.

simplesect.para: the newly created dictionary, or NULL if an error occurred.

briefdescription.para: Increment the reference counter of a dictionary.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the hash dict and its contents.

detaileddescription.para: The userdata is deallocated with f if provided.

briefdescription.para: check if a string is owned by the dictionary

simplesect.para: 1 if true, 0 if false and -1 in case of error -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Query the number of elements installed in the hash dict.

simplesect.para: the number of elements in the dictionary or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Set a size limit for the dictionary Added in 2.9.0.

simplesect.para: the previous limit of the dictionary or 0

briefdescription.para: Get how much memory is used by a dictionary for strings Added in 2.9.0.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned seed, const xmlChar *data, size_t maxLen, size_t *plen)
memberdef.name: xmlDictHashName

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned seed, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *name, size_t *pplen, size_t *plen)
memberdef.name: xmlDictHashQName

briefdescription.para: Compute the hash value of a C string.

memberdef.argsstring: (const xmlDict *dict, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *name, int len, unsigned hashValue, int *pfound)
memberdef.name: xmlDictFindEntry

briefdescription.para: Try to find a matching hash table entry.

detaileddescription.para: If an entry was found, set found to 1 and return the entry. Otherwise, set found to 0 and return the location where a new entry should be inserted.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 if a memory allocation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDict *dict, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *name, int maybeLen, int update)
memberdef.name: xmlDictLookupInternal

parameterdescription.para: length of string or -1 if unknown
whether the string should be added

briefdescription.para: Lookup a string and add it to the dictionary if it wasn't found.

parameterdescription.para: length of the key, if -1 it is recomputed

simplesect.para: the interned copy of the string or NULL if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: Lookup a dictionary entry and add the string to the dictionary if it wasn't found.

parameterdescription.para: length of the key, if -1 it is recomputed

briefdescription.para: Check if a string exists in the dictionary.

parameterdescription.para: the length of the name, if -1 it is recomputed

simplesect.para: the internal copy of the name or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Lookup the QName prefix:name and add it to the dictionary if it wasn't found.

simplesect.para: the interned copy of the string or NULL if a memory allocation failed.
